name: Seasons Taiwanese Eatery
tagline: Chinatown's top-rated Taiwanese spot — popcorn chicken, beef noodle soup, and huge portions at prices that feel like Taipei.
mustOrder: beef noodle soup — rich braised broth, tender beef shank
lu rou fan — braised pork belly over rice
talkStory: Expanded from a shaved ice and boba shop into a full Taiwanese eatery in the Chinatown Cultural Plaza. The owner is passionate and the portions are enormous — you'll struggle to finish a bowl of beef noodle soup. The popcorn chicken is addictive and the lu rou fan (braised pork rice) is textbook comfort food. Prices are shockingly reasonable. The top-rated Taiwanese restaurant on Oahu for good reason. Lunch and dinner Mon-Sat, Sunday lunch only.
